testcase.name: test_upload_png_image
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_teacher_repository.py:59: in test_upload_png_image assert response.status_code == 200, f"PNG upload failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: PNG upload failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","file"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_upload_jpg_image
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_teacher_repository.py:123: in test_upload_jpg_image assert response.status_code == 200, f"JPG upload failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: JPG upload failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","file"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_upload_pdf_file
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_teacher_repository.py:154: in test_upload_pdf_file assert response.status_code == 200, f"PDF upload failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: PDF upload failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","file"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_upload_invalid_file_type

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 for invalid file type, got: 422 assert 422 == 400 + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_teacher_repository.py:170: in test_upload_invalid_file_type assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for invalid file type, got: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for invalid file type, got: 422 E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_uploaded_file_accessible
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_teacher_repository.py:194: in test_uploaded_file_accessible assert upload_response.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_and_delete_repository_item
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_teacher_repository.py:262: in test_create_and_delete_repository_item assert upload_response.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_update_repository_item
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_teacher_repository.py:340: in test_update_repository_item file_url = upload_response.json()["url"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'url'
